text: 4 MP EXIR Fixed Bullet Network Camera
Pan: 0° to 360°, tilt: 0° to 180°, rotate: 0° to 360°
2.8 mm, horizontal FOV 100°, vertical FOV 55°, diagonal FOV 117°
4 mm, horizontal FOV 77°, vertical FOV 42°, diagonal FOV 88°
Motion detection, video tampering alarm, exception (illegal login)
Upload to FTP, notify surveillance center, send email
Saturation, brightness, contrast, sharpness, AGC and white balance adjustable by client
TCP/IP, ICMP, HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, DHCP, DNS, DDNS, RTP, RTSP, NTP, UPnP, SMTP,
Password protection, complicated password, IP address filter, Watermark, HTTPS
Security encryption, basic and digest authentication for HTTP/HTTPS, WSSE and digest
Simultaneous Live View Up to 6 channels
User/Host Up to 32 users, 3 levels: administrator, operator and user
Web Browser IE8+, Chrome 31.0-44, Firefox30.0-51, Safari8.0+
Communication Interface 1 RJ45 10M/100M self-adaptive Ethernet port
General Function Anti-flicker, heartbeat, mirror, privacy mask
Reset Reset via web browser and client software
Storage Conditions -30 °C to 60 °C (-22 °F to 140 °F), humidity 95% or less (non-condensing)
12 VDC ± 25%, Φ 5.5 mm coaxial power plug, reverse polarity protection; PoE (802.3af,
Power Consumption and Current 12 VDC, 0.35 A, max. 4.2 W; PoE (802.3af, 36 V to 57 V), 0.2 A to 0.1 A, max. 4.2 W
Material Front cover: metal, back cover: plastic
